div1.entryFree: Confront, to face, to meet, to oppose: we four indeed --ed were with four in Russian habit, LLL V, 2, 367. power --ed power, John II, 330. H4B V, 3, 108. Tit. IV, 4, 3. Mcb. I, 2, 55. whereto serves mercy but to c. the visage of offence? Hml. III, 3, 47. In John II, 215 O. Edd. comfort, most M. Edd. confront, Coll. M. come 'fore.
